hero__bio: Building elegant solutions with clean code
contact__text: Interested in working together? Let's connect and build something great.
about__text: Passionate about creating beautiful and functional web applications. With 5+ years of experience in full-stack development, I specialize in building scalable, user-centric solutions that bridge design and engineering.
about__sub: I sincerely love web development and web design, am actively learning new standards, and in my free time I share my experience with people who want to take on a new profession.
